                 +---------+
                 |  Final  |
                 +---------+
                      ^
                      |
          +-----+-----+-----+-----+
    +-----+-----+           +-----+-----+
    |  Merge 1  |           |  Merge 2  |
    +-----------+           +-----------+
          ^                       ^
          |                       |
    +--+--+-+---+           +--+--+-+---+
+---+--+    +---+--+    +---+--+    +---+--+
|  A1  |    |  A2  |    |  B1  |    |  B2  |
+------+    +------+    +------+    +------+
